text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text:
(All the way across the Pacific Ocean,
there are those who aspire to run on
American soil.)

text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text:
(Horsegirls with the grandest of ambitions
find their way to the world's grandest
racing event, their hearts set on victory.)

text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text:
A true racing festival of such prestige that
victory in any of its numerous races can
change horsegirls' whole lives!

text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text: You, me… all of us held these same dreams.

text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text:
So please, I ask everyone to put their trust
in me. This upcoming challenge requires us
all to lay down our chips on the table.

text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text:
And you'll see — I will lead
you to the highest payout.

text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text: A grand victory at the Breeders' Cup!

text_block_list.name: Espoir City
text_block_list.text:
(A victory which will catapult my name
to world-wide renown.)

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
(A victory which will lead me… to that one
special place that is all my own.)

text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text:
A victory which will turn the tides.
Reason and absurdity — I'll flip it all
on its head!

text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone has something they seek
at the Breeders' Cup. That's why…)

text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text:
This is a challenge of unprecedented scale…!
Let us stand up to it, Director!

text_block_list.name: Casino Drive
text_block_list.text:
This is our do-or-die moment, with our
own passion as the wager!
